records.m_Talk_ENG: After much debate, you came to the conclusion

9u cu87kc tranh lu86{n, ng95pi 96e95s 96ei 96e8691n k8691t lu86{n,
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nach langen 95nberlegungen bist du zum Schluss gekommen,
records.m_Talk_FRA: Apr958s un long moment de r959flexion et de nombreuses d959lib959rations,

records.m_Talk_ENG: that this employee, whom you'd been giving a lot of thought to, was absolutely necessary for the future ahead.

records.m_Talk_DEU: dass diese Mitarbeiterin, 9588ber die du so viel nachgedacht hast, absolut unverzichtbar f9588r die Zukunft des Unternehmens ist.
records.m_Talk_FRA: vous 95xtes arriv959 95p la conclusion que cette employ959e 959tait un 959l959ment vital pour votre entreprise et son futur.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, you've decided
records.m_Talk_DEU: Daher hast du beschlossen,
records.m_Talk_FRA: Vous avez donc d959cid959

records.m_Talk_ENG: that you'll be with her, no matter the consequences.

records.m_Talk_DEU: sie an dich zu binden, egal was auch geschieht.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She is everything to me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She is everything to me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She is everything to me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And I am everything to her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And I am everything to her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And I am everything to her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So we make this promise.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So we make this promise.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So we make this promise.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The dream that beats within her cold celluloid heart will keep pulsing in my hands... longer than any happy fairy tale ever could.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The dream that beats within her cold celluloid heart will keep pulsing in my hands... longer than any happy fairy tale ever could.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The dream that beats within her cold celluloid heart will keep pulsing in my hands... longer than any happy fairy tale ever could.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe, that was another wonderful story. Thanks for telling it to me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe, that was another wonderful story. Thanks for telling it to me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe, that was another wonderful story. Thanks for telling it to me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Daddy, you're amazing. How do you know so many fun stories?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Daddy, you're amazing. How do you know so many fun stories?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Daddy, you're amazing. How do you know so many fun stories?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I want to hear them more often whenever you have time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I want to hear them more often whenever you have time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I want to hear them more often whenever you have time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But the more I listen, the scarier it feels.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But the more I listen, the scarier it feels.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But the more I listen, the scarier it feels.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What if someday you run out of stories to tell me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What if someday you run out of stories to tell me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What if someday you run out of stories to tell me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What if you go away to find more stories for me and never come back?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What if you go away to find more stories for me and never come back?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What if you go away to find more stories for me and never come back?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sometimes, I get so scared of that thought that I almost want to keep you from ever leaving me again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sometimes, I get so scared of that thought that I almost want to keep you from ever leaving me again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sometimes, I get so scared of that thought that I almost want to keep you from ever leaving me again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But you know what?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But you know what?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But you know what?

records.m_Talk_ENG: As much as I love hearing about the outside world, I love that you can live freely in it even more.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As much as I love hearing about the outside world, I love that you can live freely in it even more.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As much as I love hearing about the outside world, I love that you can live freely in it even more.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm the only one who needs to stay here, locked in this room.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm the only one who needs to stay here, locked in this room.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm the only one who needs to stay here, locked in this room.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, you don't have to be sorry, Daddy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, you don't have to be sorry, Daddy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, you don't have to be sorry, Daddy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sure, I wish I had warm blood flowing through my veins and a body that moves without strings or springs...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sure, I wish I had warm blood flowing through my veins and a body that moves without strings or springs...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sure, I wish I had warm blood flowing through my veins and a body that moves without strings or springs...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But the best Daddy in the world is right here with me. The one who made me, met the Fairy Godmother, and got his wish to come true.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But the best Daddy in the world is right here with me. The one who made me, met the Fairy Godmother, and got his wish to come true.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But the best Daddy in the world is right here with me. The one who made me, met the Fairy Godmother, and got his wish to come true.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just being able to wait for you at home like this makes me truly happy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just being able to wait for you at home like this makes me truly happy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just being able to wait for you at home like this makes me truly happy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So next time you come back, bring an even better story and that pretty dress you mentioned today.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So next time you come back, bring an even better story and that pretty dress you mentioned today.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So next time you come back, bring an even better story and that pretty dress you mentioned today.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And please, be careful of the mean Wolf and the lying fox on your way, okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And please, be careful of the mean Wolf and the lying fox on your way, okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And please, be careful of the mean Wolf and the lying fox on your way, okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sleepy now. Tell me to have sweet dreams.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sleepy now. Tell me to have sweet dreams.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sleepy now. Tell me to have sweet dreams.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll wait patiently until you wind my spring again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll wait patiently until you wind my spring again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll wait patiently until you wind my spring again.
